question: According to the chart, how does the total number of visitors at Station Z compare to Station X over all days shown?

options.A: Station Z has a little over twice as many visitors as Station X.
options.B: Station Z has slightly fewer visitors than Station X.
options.C: Station Z has more than three times as many visitors as Station X.
options.D: Station Z and Station X have approximately the same number of visitors.

explanation: The y-axis starts at 800 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Station Z look as large as (or larger than) Station X even though the totals favor Station X.
